title: minuartia mutabilis var. praeruptorum
intro: Minuartia mutabilis var. praeruptorum, also known as Alpine Spring Beauty, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alpine Spring Beauty are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, making it beneficial for treating anxiety, insomnia, and skin issues. Alpine Spring Beauty is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it can also be found in some herbal supplements.
